creator: pmh@komma.de
text:
The kernel config file changed the names of the parallel
	port drivers to olpt (the deprecated one) and lpt (new).
	The man pages still refer to the drivers as lpt and nlpt resp.
	Fix before -RELEASE would be great.
	BTW: a kernel with olpt in it doesn't even link.
	Why keep it around anyway?

Fix: 

Left as an exercise to the reader [tm]
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install 3.2-BETA
